title: sharing dashboards via a link

posts.author: bandary (Bernard A)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created a dashboard and connected 4 boards. My goal is to publish the dashboard URL to my organization where non-Monday.com users can access it without a Monday.com account. Will Monday.com be looking into having the ability to sharing dashboards via a link?

We currently have the ability to share a dashboard view, but for dashboard that connect multiple boards, users will need to be invited to Monday.com as guests or members.
